description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular brown paper bag with a folded top, commonly used for packaging snacks or coffee. The front features a large, two-toned label in pale blue and tan, with an intricate octopus illustration and the text 'Kraken Coffee' in a stylized script. The back of the bag displays a similarly colored label with detailed nutrition facts and a faint octopus graphic in the background. The sides of the bag are plain, showing the folded construction and the thickness of the paper material. The bag appears to be sealed at the top with a rolled fold, typical for freshness preservation. The overall appearance is artisanal and eco-friendly, suitable for urban cafes or specialty food shops.
description: A brown paper snack bag with a folded top, featuring a two-toned label with an octopus illustration and 'Kraken Coffee' branding on the front, and a nutrition facts label on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main label with 'Kraken Coffee' text and an octopus illustration on a split pale blue and tan background.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the plain brown paper surface and the rolled, folded top closure.
description_view_2: Back view displays the nutrition facts label with a faint octopus graphic, set on the same two-toned background as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain brown paper and the folded top.
attribute_brand_logo: The front label features a stylized octopus illustration with the text 'Kraken Coffee' in black script, located centrally on a two-toned pale blue and tan background.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back label, listing calories and other nutritional information.
